mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_user (name, phone, email, region, shop_info, car_model_code, privacy_agree, reg_date) VALUES (#{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{region}, #{shopInfo}, #{carModelCode}, #{privacyAgree}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE email = #{email}, region = #{region}, shop_info = #{shopInfo}, car_model_code = #{carModelCode}, privacy_agree = #{privacyAgree}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM quiz_history WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} AND play_date = CURDATE() LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_history (user_seq, play_date, session_no, user_answers, score, status, gift_received_yn, reg_date) VALUES (#{userSeq}, CURDATE(), #{sessionNo}, #{userAnswers}, 0, 'IN_PROGRESS', 'N', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM quiz_question ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{limit}

sql.if: AND (u2.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u2.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u2.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u2.user_seq) FROM quiz_user u2 INNER JOIN quiz_history h2 ON u2.user_seq = h2.user_seq

SELECT u.user_seq, u.name, u.phone, u.email, u.region, u.shop_info, u.car_model_code, u.privacy_agree, u.reg_date AS u_reg_date, h.history_seq, h.play_date, h.session_no, h.score, h.status, h.gift_received_yn FROM quiz_user u INNER JOIN quiz_history h ON u.user_seq = h.user_seq WHERE u.user_seq IN ( SELECT sub.user_seq FROM ( SELECT u2.user_seq FROM quiz_user u2 INNER JOIN quiz_history h2 ON u2.user_seq = h2.user_seq
GROUP BY u2.user_seq ORDER BY MAX(h2.play_date) DESC, MAX(h2.session_no) DESC, u2.user_seq DESC LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{amount} ) sub ) ORDER BY h.play_date DESC, h.session_no DESC, u.user_seq DESC

SELECT u.user_seq, u.name, u.phone, u.email, u.region, u.shop_info, u.car_model_code, u.privacy_agree, u.reg_date AS u_reg_date, h.history_seq, h.play_date, h.session_no, h.score, h.status, h.gift_received_yn FROM quiz_user u INNER JOIN quiz_history h ON u.user_seq = h.user_seq WHERE u.user_seq IN ( SELECT DISTINCT u2.user_seq FROM quiz_user u2 INNER JOIN quiz_history h2 ON u2.user_seq = h2.user_seq
) ORDER BY h.play_date DESC, h.session_no DESC, u.user_seq DESC
SELECT * FROM quiz_question ORDER BY question_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_question (question_text, choice_1, choice_2, choice_3, choice_4, correct_answer) VALUES (#{questionText}, #{choice1}, #{choice2}, #{choice3}, #{choice4}, #{correctAnswer})
mapper.update: UPDATE quiz_question SET question_text = #{questionText}, choice_1 = #{choice1}, choice_2 = #{choice2}, choice_3 = #{choice3}, choice_4 = #{choice4}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer} WHERE question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_visit_stats (visit_date, visit_count) VALUES (CURDATE(), 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE visit_count = visit_count + 1
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(visit_date, '%m.%d') AS regDateStr, visit_count AS cnt FROM quiz_visit_stats WHERE visit_date >= DATE(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 DAY)) ORDER BY visit_date ASC
